data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Partial value tracking across multiple bookings', but the evidence provided does not demonstrate that this functionality is implemented or tested. The linked use case specifies the need for partial value tracking, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence of this feature being validated or confirmed. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of partial value tracking across multiple bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
